pi_items.source: Task requirements (task.json lines 5-20) and verifier.py lines 67-70 which checks for trigger conditions with ClickId equals 'hero-cta-primary'

Task requirements (task.json line 19) match verifier.py line 100 which checks for eventCategory containing 'Engagement'. Matomo Tag Manager documentation confirms support for event tracking with category, action, and name fields.

Task requirements (task.json line 19) match verifier.py line 100 which checks for eventAction containing 'Hero Click'. Matomo documentation (https://matomo.org/faq/tag-manager/event-tracking-with-matomo-tag-manager/) confirms event tracking structure.
Task requirements specify Event Name: 'Get Started' (task.json line 20), but verifier.py does not check this field (no eventName verification in lines 93-110)

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Matomo Tag Manager (v5 based on docker-compose.yml) to track a CTA button click. The trigger target element ID is 'hero-cta-primary', and the event is configured with category 'Engagement' and action 'Hero Click'. The event name 'Get Started' is specified in task requirements but not verified by the verifier logic. The data is synthetic test data created in a Docker-based Matomo environment (MariaDB 10.11, Matomo v5). All metadata values align with standard Matomo Tag Manager event tracking practices and the stated task requirements.
